title: Traffic alert: Heavy traffic expected near dome Saturday for Syracuse lacrosse doubleheader
summary: Syracuse Police Department issued a traffic alert for heavy congestion expected around JMA Wireless Dome on Saturday due to Syracuse University hosting a lacrosse doubleheader (women's vs. Pittsburgh at 10 a.m., men's vs. Duke at 2 p.m.). The alert advises drivers and fans to plan ahead and arrive early to mitigate delays.
processing_notes: Article is a routine traffic advisory with no direct CIO relevance unless contextualized within smart traffic management or real-time event coordination initiatives
